landing.title: TOC Editor
landing.description: Visually add, edit, and reorder PDF bookmarks and table of contents

tocEditor.title: TOC Editor
tocEditor.description: Edit bookmarks (Document Outline) in JSON format. Click 'Apply' to update the PDF's bookmark structure.

importStructureDialog.title: Import Structure
importStructureDialog.intro: You can import JSON or CSV. JSON matches the editor's native structure, while CSV is converted into a nested outline during import.
importStructureDialog.jsonDescription: The root value is an array. Each item has title, pageIndex, and children. pageIndex is zero-based, and children is an array with the same structure.
importStructureDialog.csvDescription: Use the columns level,title,page. level is a zero-based hierarchy depth, and page is a one-based page number. Wrap titles containing commas or quotes in double quotes, and escape quotes by doubling them.
importStructureDialog.promptDescription: When generating bookmarks from PDF text or an existing table of contents, this prompt helps produce JSON that can be pasted into the editor.
importStructureDialog.promptCode:
From the following PDF text or table-of-contents information, output only JSON for PDF bookmarks.

Output format:
- The root value is an array
- Each item is { "title": string, "pageIndex": number, "children": OutlineNode[] }
- pageIndex is zero-based. If the source page number is 1, pageIndex is 0
- children is always an array. Use [] when there are no children
- Do not output Markdown code fences, explanations, or comments
- Preserve source titles, and do not include decorative numbering or page numbers in title

Input:
[paste the table of contents or source text here]

pageOperations.title: Page Operations
pageOperations.description: Drag & drop to reorder, delete, and extract pages

splitMerge.title: Split & Merge
splitMerge.description: Merge multiple PDFs or batch split at specified pages

metadata.title: Edit Metadata
metadata.description: Freely modify PDF metadata such as title and author

hero.subtitle: Complete PDF bookmark editing, page operations, splitting, and merging entirely in your browser

footer.privacy: All processing is completed within your browser. Files are never sent to any server.

split.title: Batch Split
split.description: Split based on bookmark hierarchy, or by specifying page ranges.

options.folderHierarchy: Represent depth over 2 levels as folders in ZIP
options.folderHierarchyHint: Folder hierarchy option is available from Lv.2.

errors.downloadFailed: An error occurred while preparing the download

metadata.title: Metadata
metadata.description: View and edit the Document Information Dictionary. Use 'Sanitize' to remove all creator information at once.
